subcodes.first_line: Happiness lieth in knowledge, and knowledge in piety, and piety in detachment and contempt for all the vanities of this world
subcodes.first_line_orig: سعادت در علم است و علم در تقوی و تقوی در انقطاع و تنفر از جمیع زخارف دنیا
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
